title: The Reminder
content:
While I watch the Christmas blaze
    Paint the room with ruddy rays,
    Something makes my vision glide
    To the frosty scene outside.

    There, to reach a rotting berry,
    Toils a thrush, - constrained to very
    Dregs of food by sharp distress,
    Taking such with thankfulness.

    Why, O starving bird, when I
    One day's joy would justify,
    And put misery out of view,
    Do you make me notice you!
meaning:
Thomas Hardy's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Reminder"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
